mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orinuno_dump_state ( dump_name, dump_url, last_checked_at, last_changed_at, last_status, last_error_message, etag, last_modified_header, content_length, consecutive_failures ) VALUES ( #{dumpName}, #{dumpUrl}, #{lastCheckedAt}, #{lastChangedAt}, #{lastStatus}, #{lastErrorMessage}, #{etag}, #{lastModifiedHeader}, #{contentLength}, #{consecutiveFailures} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE dump_url = VALUES(dump_url), last_checked_at = VALUES(last_checked_at), last_changed_at = COALESCE(VALUES(last_changed_at), last_changed_at), last_status = VALUES(last_status), last_error_message = VALUES(last_error_message), etag = COALESCE(VALUES(etag), etag), last_modified_header = COALESCE(VALUES(last_modified_header), last_modified_header), content_length = COALESCE(VALUES(content_length), content_length), consecutive_failures = VALUES(consecutive_failures)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orinuno_dump_state ORDER BY dump_name
